reviews.comment:
Personal con excelente disposición, da gusto cargar combustible y utilizar baños. Ignoro cual es la causa por la que los servicompras son tan caros en todas las estaciones de servicios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is very helpful; it's a pleasure to refuel and use the restrooms. I don't know why the convenience stores are so expensive at all ACA service stations.
